page: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU instance designed for workloads requiring substantial parallel processing capabilities and high memory capacity. The server features an Intel x86_64 architecture with 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating with a shared CPU allocation model. It is equipped with 375.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 11.72 GB of RAM per core.

For acceleration, the instance integrates two NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture family, delivering a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 2200 GB NVMe SSD, which supports high-speed data retrieval and local caching. The network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Given the shared CPU allocation alongside high-end dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs and a large memory footprint, this instance offers a specific resource density tradeoff. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for GPU-bound tasks that do not require dedicated, non-shared CPU execution. Appropriate workloads include large language model inference, deep learning training, complex graphics rendering, and data science pipelines that leverage GPU acceleration and require a large memory buffer.
description: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU instance configured with an Intel x86_64 processor providing 32 vCPUs and 32 physical cores under a shared allocation model. The system features 375.0 GB of system memory, yielding 11.72 GB of RAM per core, and includes a 2200 GB local NVMe SSD. Graphics and compute acceleration are driven by two NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs, which provide a combined 96 GB of VRAM. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive and GPU-accelerated workloads. The shared CPU allocation represents a key architectural tradeoff, making the instance highly suitable for GPU-bound tasks rather than CPU-intensive processing. It is optimized for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science, and parallel computing tasks that benefit from massive VRAM and system memory.

tagline: A high-capacity GPU instance featuring dual NVIDIA L40S accelerators, 375 GB of system memory, and local NVMe storage for parallel computing.

32 Intel x86_64 vCPUs with a shared allocation model
375.0 GB of system memory providing 11.72 GB per core

Suited for GPU-bound workloads, machine learning, and data science
